Payroll Report — FY 2023: Total payroll expenditure for fiscal year 2023 was $31.7 million across 214 full-time employees. Average compensation increased by 5.2% following the annual merit review cycle completed in March. Benefits costs, including health insurance and 401(k) matching, accounted for an additional $6.4 million. Payroll taxes remitted to federal and state agencies totaled $3.9 million for the year.
